title: How a tutor learned to change course

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for The average stayed flat. We wanted to know what happened at the stuck point.: a precise average-slope ruler laid across a darkened tutoring scene under venet...
images.caption: Where we began: Paper 2.0 compared tutors prompted in different ways.
images.section_heading: The average stayed flat. We wanted to know what happened at the stuck point.
images.visual_metaphor: a precise average-slope ruler laid across a darkened tutoring scene under venetian-blind light, while the single decisive hinge of the lesson slips out of the ruler frame into shadow

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for We made the turning point the whole experiment.: a tutoring desk lit hard as a noir theatre stage, three chalk marks on the boards labelled block, turn, reco...
images.caption: Changing the question: The challenge was to make each beat visible without claiming we could infer a hidden mental state.
images.section_heading: We made the turning point the whole experiment.
images.visual_metaphor: a tutoring desk lit hard as a noir theatre stage, three chalk marks on the boards labelled block, turn, recognition, and a checker stamp coming down on the third mark

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for The tutor cannot give away the answer. It has to help the learner reach it.: a proof drawn as a constellation of wired evidence nodes the tutor must walk a l...
images.caption: A lesson we can check: As the learner establishes each fact, the remaining distance to the answer gets shorter.
images.section_heading: The tutor cannot give away the answer. It has to help the learner reach it.
images.visual_metaphor: a proof drawn as a constellation of wired evidence nodes the tutor must walk a learner across, a distance dial marked D ticking toward zero, the final node still behind a small curtain

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for “Be gentler” did not help. A clear rule did.: a tutor wearing one frozen rhetorical mask repeated down a strip of film, a soft whispered manner-note only thi...
images.caption: The first surprise: Left to itself, the tutor fell into a rut.
images.section_heading: “Be gentler” did not help. A clear rule did.
images.visual_metaphor: a tutor wearing one frozen rhetorical mask repeated down a strip of film, a soft whispered manner-note only thickening the rut, and a single index card naming the device that cracks the mask open

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for A small internal check made the tutor break its own habit.: an empty director chair offstage in stage haze while a small lamplit watcher is installed inside...
images.caption: Moving the rule inside: An outside director could make the tutor name its move, but we wanted the tutor to carry the rule itself.
images.section_heading: A small internal check made the tutor break its own habit.
images.visual_metaphor: an empty director chair offstage in stage haze while a small lamplit watcher is installed inside the tutor head, catching a third identical gesture in mid-air before it is spoken

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for The tutor did not need more skill. It needed to notice the loss.: a learner memory board with inked entries dissolving to smoke, one tutor who can see the fa...
images.caption: The learner who forgets: The simulated learner usually said enough for the tutor to infer what was happening.
images.section_heading: The tutor did not need more skill. It needed to notice the loss.
images.visual_metaphor: a learner memory board with inked entries dissolving to smoke, one tutor who can see the fading marks reaching to restore them and a blind tutor beside an empty outstretched hand

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for One sensible early clue broke the lesson. One small rule repaired it.: a clue-release calendar pinned to a noir investigation board, the tutor pulling one ca...
images.caption: Handing over the calendar: We then let the tutor decide when to release clues.
images.section_heading: One sensible early clue broke the lesson. One small rule repaired it.
images.visual_metaphor: a clue-release calendar pinned to a noir investigation board, the tutor pulling one card a single beat too early as a stage curtain drops, and a one-step repair tag stitching the broken thread back

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for Two pacing rules helped. Which one helped depended on the shape of the lesson.: two hard-edged lanterns over a forked stage, one lantern reading the page sur...
images.caption: Does the rule travel: Without help, the tutor's timing was unreliable: it completed only 4 of 10 proofs across two replication sets.
images.section_heading: Two pacing rules helped. Which one helped depended on the shape of the lesson.
images.visual_metaphor: two hard-edged lanterns over a forked stage, one lantern reading the page surface and one reading the hidden depth below the boards, each bright over a differently shaped little world and dark over the other

images.alt: Editorial cartoon for The tutor can govern parts of its conduct. The claim stays deliberately small.: a noir evidence wall with three pinned cards reading settled, scope-bound, an...
images.caption: What we can honestly say: The tutor can govern parts of its conduct.
images.section_heading: The tutor can govern parts of its conduct. The claim stays deliberately small.
images.visual_metaphor: a noir evidence wall with three pinned cards reading settled, scope-bound, and open, and a heavy rubber stamp pressing the words dramatic form, not mind-reading
